name: Howlin' Hot Chicken Papaya Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine shredded cabbage, chopped cilantro, and sliced green onions. Add hot sauce, orange juice, lime juice, and sesame oil. Mix thoroughly.
2. Add the julienned chicken to the mixture and toss to coat evenly. Arrange the slaw on a serving platter or plates and top with slices of papaya.
Serving suggestion: Fill a submarine roll with the slaw for an unusual sandwich. Yield: 4-6 servings
Nutritional information (per serving): 139 calories, 6.3 grams fat, 1 gram saturated fat, 26 milligrams cholesterol, 37 milligrams sodium, 41 percent of calories from fat. Source: "The Great Hot Sauce Book"
